content:
- Translation & mutation systems (wordcut, syntax processors, glyphs)

---

### PHASE 3B: DEEPEN FIRST, THEN PUBLISH

Before we finalize any public-facing documents, we’ll run each part of the system through the following frameworks:

- **Comparative Systems:**
Jungian archetypes, Deleuze & Guattari (desiring machines), Campbell (myth cycle), Foucault (archives), Hofstadter (self-referencing systems)

- **Transmedia Storytelling:**
Pixar Braintrust, Valve’s flat model, Lucasfilm lore expansion, modular media nodes, ARG & lore gamification

- **Language & Code:**
Translation trees, syntax mutation engines, multilingual + literal/metaphoric conversion (ENG/ESP/JPN/GAE/etc.)

- **Cultural Archive Design:**
Pop culture + mythology interweave, queer archives, sound poetics, visual semiotics
